layers.name: Presentation
layers.detail: Flutter widgets and state containers. Interacts only with Application layer.

layers.name: Application
layers.detail: Orchestrates domain logic. Depends on Domain abstractions, never on infrastructure details.

layers.name: Domain
layers.detail: The protected core. Pure Dart, no Flutter, no I/O. The heart of each feature.

layers.name: Infrastructure
layers.detail: The outermost ring. Implements Domain contracts against Isar, ONNX and OS services.

dependencyRule: Dependencies point inward only: Presentation -> Application -> Domain <- Infrastructure. The Domain core knows nothing about the outside world.

core.name: core/
core.description: Shared utilities, DI container, theming and reusable widgets
